diffs.diff:
--- a/find_evaluator_full.py
+++ b/find_evaluator_full.py
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python

+"""Get the FULL evaluator source code."""

+import os

+import sys

+import inspect

+

+os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE'] = '1'

+os.environ['MUJOCO_GL'] = 'egl'

+

+from VLABench.evaluation.evaluator.base import Evaluator

+

+# Get FULL source

+src = inspect.getsource(Evaluator)

+print('=== FULL Evaluator source ===')

+print(src)

+

+# Also check the module-level imports

+mod = inspect.getmodule(Evaluator)

+print('\n=== Module source (first 3000 chars) ===')

+mod_src = inspect.getsource(mod)

+print(mod_src[:3000])

+

+# Check what build_from_config does

+print('\n=== Searching for build_from_config ===')

+import VLABench

+vlab_dir = os.path.dirname(VLABench.__file__)

+import subprocess

+result = subprocess.run(['grep', '-rn', 'def build_from_config', vlab_dir], capture_output=True, text=True)

+print(result.stdout[:3000])

+

+# Check dm_task build_from_config

+print('\n=== dm_task source ===')

+from VLABench.tasks.dm_task import LM4ManipBaseTask

+src2 = inspect.getsource(LM4ManipBaseTask.build_from_config)

+print(src2[:3000])

+

+# Check IK function used by evaluator

+print('\n=== IK / action conversion ===')

+result2 = subprocess.run(['grep', '-rn', 'def ik', vlab_dir], capture_output=True, text=True)

+print(result2.stdout[:2000])

+result3 = subprocess.run(['grep', '-rn', 'inverse_kinematics', vlab_dir], capture_output=True, text=True)

+print(result3.stdout[:2000])

+

+# Check the robot's IK

+print('\n=== Robot IK ===')

+result4 = subprocess.run(['grep', '-rn', 'def solve_ik\|def ik\|inverse_kine', os.path.join(vlab_dir, 'tasks')], capture_output=True, text=True)

+print(result4.stdout[:2000])

+

+# Check euler_to_quaternion

+print('\n=== euler/quaternion utils ===')

+result5 = subprocess.run(['grep', '-rn', 'euler_to_quaternion\|quaternion_to_euler', vlab_dir], capture_output=True, text=True)

+print(result5.stdout[:3000])

+

+# Check the actual function

+print('\n=== utils source ===')

+try:

+    from VLABench.utils.utils import euler_to_quaternion, quaternion_to_euler

+    print(inspect.getsource(euler_to_quaternion))

+    print(inspect.getsource(quaternion_to_euler))

+except ImportError:

+    # Search for it

+    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(vlab_dir):

+        for f in files:

+            if f.endswith('.py'):

+                fpath = os.path.join(root, f)

+                try:

+                    with open(fpath) as fh:

+                        content = fh.read()

+                    if 'def euler_to_quaternion' in content:

+                        print(f'Found in {fpath}')

+                        lines = content.split('\n')

+                        for i, line in enumerate(lines):

+                            if 'def euler_to_quaternion' in line or 'def quaternion_to_euler' in line:

+                                print('\n'.join(lines[i:i+25]))

+                                print()

+                except:

+                    pass

+

+print('\n=== Done ===')
